parts.answer: An answer that includes the following points: • number of minutes in one day calculated (1) • volume in 24 hours given in standard form (1) OR • volume in one hour calculated (1) • volume in 24 hours given in standard form (1) 1 × 60 × 24 = 1440 7.2 × 10 (lit res) 5 x 60 = 300 7.2 × 103 (litres) Correct answer with no working (2) Correct answer not in standard form = 1 mark (2) number Answer Additional guidance Mark

An answer that includes one similarity and one difference: Similarities: • both have walls containing {muscle cells / elastic fibres / an endothelial cell lining / an (outer) collagen layer} (1) • both have a valve (at the point they leave the heart) (1) Differences: • aorta has a {lumen with a wider diameter / thicker wall / more elastic tissue / more muscle tissue / more collagen} (1) • aorta has branches to more organs (1) (2 ) number Answer Additional guidance Mark
